bug-arc-1/3.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/3.text: These dashboards are way too slow...

bug-arc-1/3.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/3.text: I can't decide between Redis and the database only.

bug-arc-1/3.text: We need to weigh up speed, cost, and complexity.

bug-arc-1/3.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/3.text: Redis makes more sense to me for this case.

bug-arc-1/3.speaker: Nam

bug-arc-1/5.text: I'm debating whether to learn Go or improve my frontend skills.

bug-arc-1/5.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/5.text: I'm more interested in backend systems these days.

bug-arc-1/5.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/5.text: I prefer backend to frontend right now.

bug-arc-1/5.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/5.text: I'm into building APIs. I think I'll go with Go.

bug-arc-1/5.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/5.text: But I still need to think it over tonight.

bug-arc-1/6.speaker: Nam

bug-arc-1/6.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/6.text: I'm wondering whether to study tonight or sleep.

bug-arc-1/6.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/6.text: Maybe I should think it over first.

bug-arc-1/6.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/6.text: This is a big decision. I'll sleep on it.

bug-arc-1/6.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/6.text: A clear mind after a good sleep.

bug-arc-1/7.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/7.text: Backend makes more sense to me right now.

bug-arc-1/7.speaker: Kenji
bug-arc-1/7.text: I'd rather study a little every day than rush.

bug-arc-1/8.text: Nighttime team dinner at a lively Tokyo izakaya.

bug-arc-1/8.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/8.text: I can't decide what to order.

bug-arc-1/8.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/8.text: I prefer sushi to ramen tonight.

bug-arc-1/8.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/8.text: I'll pass on that. I'm not really into spicy food.

bug-arc-1/8.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-1/8.text: I think I'll go with matcha ice cream.

bug-arc-1/8.speaker: Kenji
bug-arc-1/8.text: By the way, team — how about our next trip? Tokyo or Osaka?

bug-arc-2/6.speaker: Linh
bug-arc-2/6.text: A new QA discovery just came in.

bug-arc-2/6.speaker: Kenji
bug-arc-2/6.text: The release plan might fall through if this bug stays open.

bug-arc-2/6.speaker: Kenji
bug-arc-2/6.text: I see your point, but we need more testing.

bug-arc-2/6.speaker: Linh
bug-arc-2/6.text: The bug affects mobile checkout only.

bug-arc-2/6.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-2/6.text: We can isolate the impact, ship a scoped fix, and protect the release.

bug-arc-2/7.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-2/7.text: The issue is that cached data stays stale after payment.

bug-arc-2/9.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-2/9.text: We need to think through the risks.

bug-arc-2/9.speaker: Kenji
bug-arc-2/9.text: I see your point, but I have a different take.

bug-arc-2/9.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-2/9.text: I think we should release only after QA signs off.

bug-arc-2/9.speaker: Kenji
bug-arc-2/9.text: Agreed. Let's wait for QA sign-off.

bug-arc-2/9.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-2/9.text: Decision locked. Quality first, release next.

bug-arc-2/10.speaker: Linh
bug-arc-2/10.text: Test progress is at 100% — we're ready.

bug-arc-2/10.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-2/10.text: We ran through the final demo flow.

bug-arc-2/10.speaker: Kenji
bug-arc-2/10.text: The API is returning normal data now.

bug-arc-2/10.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-2/10.text: Let's follow through with the safer release.

bug-arc-2/10.speaker: Kenji
bug-arc-2/10.text: QA sign-off complete — release approved! Great work, team!

bug-arc-3/5.speaker: Linh
bug-arc-3/5.text: We need to get through the QA checklist.

bug-arc-3/5.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/5.text: I see your point, but we still have a blocker on mobile.

bug-arc-3/5.speaker: Linh
bug-arc-3/5.text: I think we should retest before release.

bug-arc-3/6.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/6.text: A rollback makes more sense to me.

bug-arc-3/6.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/6.text: I think I'll go with a rollback.

bug-arc-3/6.speaker: Linh
bug-arc-3/6.text: Let's stick with the safer approach.

bug-arc-3/6.speaker: Kenji
bug-arc-3/6.text: We can rule out a full refactor for now.

bug-arc-3/6.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/6.text: Let's do this the smart way. Ship safe. Improve fast.

bug-arc-3/7.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/7.text: Let's run through the demo flow.

bug-arc-3/7.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/7.text: We should go through the logs one more time.

bug-arc-3/7.speaker: Linh
bug-arc-3/7.text: We need to think it over carefully.

bug-arc-3/7.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/7.text: I'm more interested in a safe release than a fast release.

bug-arc-3/8.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/8.text: The release plan might fall through.

bug-arc-3/8.speaker: Linh
bug-arc-3/8.text: We need to think through the risks.

bug-arc-3/8.speaker: Aoi
bug-arc-3/8.text: If we decide to rollback, we need to follow through.

bug-arc-3/8.speaker: Kenji
bug-arc-3/8.text: I see your point, but I have a different take.

bug-arc-3/8.speaker: Linh
bug-arc-3/8.text: It comes down to risk and timeline.

bug-arc-3/8.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/8.text: We need a clear decision before the release window closes.

bug-arc-3/9.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/9.text: The issue is that the payment API failed on mobile.

bug-arc-3/9.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/9.text: It seems like stale cache caused incorrect data.

bug-arc-3/9.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/9.text: This service acts as a bridge between the frontend and the payment system.

bug-arc-3/9.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/9.text: The frontend relies on this API.

bug-arc-3/9.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/9.text: We got through the QA checklist and ran through the demo flow.

bug-arc-3/9.speaker: Nam
bug-arc-3/9.text: Let's follow through with the safer release.

career-growth/43.speaker: Nam
career-growth/43.text: I see your point, but I'm not sure I agree.

career-growth/43.speaker: Kenji
career-growth/43.text: Let's ship a quick frontend patch to hide the error state.

career-growth/43.speaker: Nam
career-growth/43.text: The frontend relies on this API to load user data.

career-growth/43.speaker: Nam
career-growth/43.text: We need to think through the risks.

career-growth/43.speaker: Aoi
career-growth/43.text: Let's investigate the API error first.

career-growth/49.speaker: Kenji
career-growth/49.text: We need to decide what to focus on this sprint.

career-growth/49.speaker: Nam
career-growth/49.text: I'm debating whether to support the new feature now or improve stability first.

career-growth/49.speaker: Nam
career-growth/49.text: I see your point, but I have a different take.

career-growth/49.speaker: Nam
career-growth/49.text: We need to weigh up speed, safety, and maintainability.

career-growth/49.speaker: Nam
career-growth/49.text: I'd opt for improving stability first.

career-growth/49.speaker: Nam
career-growth/49.text: It comes down to user trust.

living/29.speaker: Nam
living/29.text: I have no idea which exit to take.

living/29.speaker: Nam
living/29.text: Can you show me how to get to the west exit?

living/30.speaker: Agent
living/30.text: Welcome! Here are the rental application forms.

living/30.speaker: Nam
living/30.text: I need to fill out this form.

living/30.speaker: Nam
living/30.text: Do you have an English version of this form?

living/30.speaker: Nam
living/30.text: I'm not sure what to write here.

living/30.speaker: Nam
living/30.text: Just to clarify, do you mean my current address or my new address?

living/30.speaker: Nam
living/30.text: I'll check with Aoi and get back to you.

living/35.speaker: Nam
living/35.text: My first remote meeting from home...

living/35.speaker: Kenji
living/35.text: Can you walk me through the payment flow?

living/35.speaker: Linh
living/35.text: Let's run through the logs quickly.

living/35.speaker: Aoi
living/35.text: We need to think through the risks.

living/35.speaker: Nam
living/35.text: I'm not sure I agree with deploying tonight.

living/36.speaker: Nam
living/36.text: We need to follow through on this fix.

living/36.speaker: Linh
living/36.text: Let's work through the bug step by step.

living/36.speaker: Nam
living/36.text: I traced the issue. The payment gateway was timing out before sending a response.

living/36.speaker: Nam
living/36.text: One problem fixed. Next up: more tests and monitoring.

living/37.speaker: Nam
living/37.text: I'm running late for my clinic appointment.

living/37.speaker: Nam
living/37.text: I have an appointment at 9 AM.

living/37.speaker: Nam
living/37.text: I'm not sure how to explain my symptoms.

living/37.speaker: Staff
living/37.text: Could you speak a little more slowly?

living/37.speaker: Nam
living/37.text: Sure, thank you. That helps a lot.

living/37.speaker: Nam
living/37.text: I'm glad that the staff helped me.

living/38.speaker: Nam
living/38.text: I'm getting used to life in Japan.

living/38.speaker: Nam
living/38.text: I didn't expect Tokyo to feel this peaceful.

living/38.speaker: Nam
living/38.text: This street brings back memories from our trip.

living/38.speaker: Nam
living/38.text: I came across a nice little café.

living/39.speaker: Nam
living/39.text: Great job, team! The release was such a win!

living/39.speaker: Nam
living/39.text: I'm not really into spicy food.

living/39.speaker: Aoi
living/39.text: I'm more interested in local dishes.

living/39.speaker: Kenji
living/39.text: I'd rather try something simple than order too much.

living/39.speaker: Nam
living/39.text: I think I'll go with this one.

traveling/12.speaker: Friend
traveling/12.text: The team has arrived in Japan!

traveling/12.speaker: Nam
traveling/12.text: I prefer taking the train to taking a taxi.

traveling/12.speaker: Mai
traveling/12.text: Taking the train makes more sense to me.

traveling/12.speaker: Tuan
traveling/12.text: I'd rather take the train than sit in traffic.

traveling/13.speaker: Nam
traveling/13.text: I'm not sure if this hotel is a good choice.

traveling/13.speaker: Nam
traveling/13.text: We can rule out this hotel because it's too far.

traveling/13.speaker: Friend
traveling/13.text: I'll pass on the hotel that is too far from the city center.

traveling/13.speaker: Nam
traveling/13.text: Let's narrow it down to two hotels.

traveling/13.speaker: Friend
traveling/13.text: Great! Staying closer means more time to explore and less time on the train.

traveling/13.speaker: Nam
traveling/13.text: Next stop: Osaka! Let's keep the same location rule.

traveling/15.speaker: Nam
traveling/15.text: After thinking it over, we settled on Osaka.

traveling/15.speaker: Nam
traveling/15.text: Osaka makes more sense because the food scene is amazing.

traveling/15.speaker: Nam
traveling/15.text: I think I'll go with Osaka.

traveling/15.speaker: Aoi
traveling/15.text: Let's stick with the current itinerary.

traveling/15.speaker: Nam
traveling/15.text: Osaka it is! Let's make epic memories!

traveling/15.speaker: Friend
traveling/15.text: New city, new energy, new stories.

traveling/17.speaker: Nam
traveling/17.text: We've got one more day in Osaka. What should we do?

traveling/17.speaker: Friend
traveling/17.text: I'm more interested in food tours than shopping.

traveling/17.speaker: Aoi
traveling/17.text: I like local food more than shopping malls.

traveling/17.speaker: Kenji
traveling/17.text: A food tour makes more sense to me.

traveling/17.speaker: Kenji
traveling/17.text: I'd rather try local food than buy souvenirs.

traveling/17.speaker: Nam
traveling/17.text: Let's eat, explore, and make amazing memories together!

traveling/19.speaker: Nam
traveling/19.text: Can you walk me through the route?

traveling/19.speaker: Aoi
traveling/19.text: Let's run through the plan one more time.

traveling/19.speaker: Aoi
traveling/19.text: We need to get through the station before rush hour.

traveling/19.speaker: Kenji
traveling/19.text: Plan locked. Let's make today unforgettable!

traveling/20.speaker: Nam
traveling/20.text: I'm debating whether to go now or wait until tomorrow.

traveling/20.speaker: Nam
traveling/20.text: We need to think through the timing.

traveling/20.speaker: Nam
traveling/20.text: It comes down to whether we can catch the next train.

traveling/20.speaker: Friend
traveling/20.text: I think Kyoto is better because the sunset looks beautiful.

traveling/20.speaker: Nam
traveling/20.text: Let's go! Kyoto, here we come!

traveling/21.speaker: Friend
traveling/21.text: Should we wake up early for Mount Fuji?

traveling/21.speaker: Nam
traveling/21.text: I don't know if we should go early or sleep more.

traveling/21.speaker: Friend
traveling/21.text: I'd rather wake up early than miss the view.

traveling/21.speaker: Kenji
traveling/21.text: Fuji makes more sense to me because this is a rare chance.

traveling/21.speaker: Nam
traveling/21.text: Team decision: Let's wake up early and go see Fuji!

traveling/21.speaker: Nam
traveling/21.text: Good night, team — alarms set for Fuji morning!

traveling/22.speaker: Friend
traveling/22.text: We're up early and on track! Mount Fuji, here we come!

traveling/22.speaker: Friend
traveling/22.text: Let's stick with the current plan.

traveling/22.speaker: Kenji
traveling/22.text: We can rule out the late train.

traveling/22.speaker: Nam
traveling/22.text: I'll opt for the early train.

traveling/22.speaker: Kenji
traveling/22.text: We need to follow through on the plan.

traveling/22.speaker: Nam
traveling/22.text: Mount Fuji is waiting — let's keep our backup plans ready.

traveling/23.speaker: Friend
traveling/23.text: The plan might fall through because of the rain.

traveling/23.speaker: Nam
traveling/23.text: I'm not sure I agree with canceling right away.

traveling/23.speaker: Nam
traveling/23.text: Let's work through our backup options.

traveling/23.speaker: Friend
traveling/23.text: Let's wait a bit, enjoy the café, and recheck the weather!

traveling/23.speaker: Friend
traveling/23.text: Look! The sky might clear up later!

traveling/24.speaker: Nam
traveling/24.text: I'm glad we didn't give up.

traveling/24.speaker: Nam
traveling/24.text: It came down to patience and timing.

traveling/24.speaker: Nam
traveling/24.text: I think this trip made me more confident.

traveling/24.speaker: Nam
traveling/24.text: Let's head back to Tokyo with full hearts!

traveling/25.speaker: Nam
traveling/25.text: We're back in Tokyo. What a journey.

traveling/25.speaker: Nam
traveling/25.text: At first, I didn't know what to say.

traveling/25.speaker: Nam
traveling/25.text: I can say what I prefer, what I'm unsure about, and what makes sense to me.

traveling/25.speaker: Nam
traveling/25.text: We didn't just visit Japan — we grew together.

traveling/25.speaker: Nam
traveling/25.text: Thank you, Tokyo! Thank you, team!

silicon-valley-get/105.speaker: PM
silicon-valley-get/105.text: Welcome! I'll get you looped in on the launch channel.

silicon-valley-get/105.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/105.text: Sorry — I keep getting pinged on every thread.

silicon-valley-get/105.speaker: Buddy
silicon-valley-get/105.text: Don't worry. We'll get you up to speed by standup tomorrow.

silicon-valley-get/105.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/105.text: There are twelve stakeholders I wasn't looped in on yet.

silicon-valley-get/105.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/105.text: I'm getting up to speed — but I still get pinged after hours.

silicon-valley-get/106.speaker: PM
silicon-valley-get/106.text: We can't ship without buy-in from design and legal.

silicon-valley-get/106.speaker: Designer
silicon-valley-get/106.text: We're not aligned on the user flow yet.

silicon-valley-get/106.speaker: Kenji
silicon-valley-get/106.text: Let's get aligned on one MVP before we debate polish.

silicon-valley-get/106.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/106.text: If we get buy-in on this scope, we can get the ball rolling Monday.

silicon-valley-get/107.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/107.text: I'm blocked on the payments API — third day.

silicon-valley-get/107.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/107.text: Every time I ask, I get blocked on a different dependency.

silicon-valley-get/107.speaker: Kenji
silicon-valley-get/107.text: Nam needs to get unblocked today — demo is Friday.

silicon-valley-get/107.speaker: Platform
silicon-valley-get/107.text: You should be unblocked now — try the staging key.

silicon-valley-get/107.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/107.text: Once I'm unblocked, I can get through code review tonight.

silicon-valley-get/108.speaker: PM
silicon-valley-get/108.text: We need sign-off from QA and product before we get shipped.

silicon-valley-get/108.speaker: Linh
silicon-valley-get/108.text: Staging looks good — I'll get sign-off from QA in ten minutes.

silicon-valley-get/108.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/108.text: Are we ready? I want everything to get ready before we merge.

silicon-valley-get/108.speaker: Hook
silicon-valley-get/108.text: Next: Pulled Into the War Room

silicon-valley-get/109.speaker: On-call
silicon-valley-get/109.text: Sorry — you're getting pulled into the checkout war room.

silicon-valley-get/109.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/109.text: I'm stuck — the error only happens in prod, not staging.

silicon-valley-get/109.speaker: Kenji
silicon-valley-get/109.text: Don't spin — tell PM you'll get back to them in thirty minutes.

silicon-valley-get/109.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/109.text: I'll get back to the team once rollback is confirmed.

silicon-valley-get/109.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/109.text: Got pulled into my first war room — and we got through it.

silicon-valley-get/110.speaker: CEO
silicon-valley-get/110.text: Big news — we're getting acquired by a global platform.

silicon-valley-get/110.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/110.text: Does this mean layoffs… or opportunities?

silicon-valley-get/110.speaker: VP
silicon-valley-get/110.text: I wanted face time with you before the reorg.

silicon-valley-get/110.speaker: VP
silicon-valley-get/110.text: You're getting promoted to senior — they noticed your ship work.

silicon-valley-get/110.speaker: Kenji
silicon-valley-get/110.text: When a startup gets acquired, culture changes — stay flexible.

silicon-valley-get/110.speaker: Nam
silicon-valley-get/110.text: I got face time, got promoted… and the whole company got acquired.

switzerland-travel/111.speaker: Friend
switzerland-travel/111.text: Welcome! Let's get to the hotel before rush hour.

switzerland-travel/111.speaker: Clerk
switzerland-travel/111.text: I'll get you checked in — passport and booking, please.

switzerland-travel/111.speaker: Friend
switzerland-travel/111.text: Walk with me — you'll get your bearings in the old town.

switzerland-travel/111.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/111.text: It took an hour to get to Zurich, but I already love it.

switzerland-travel/111.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/111.text: Once I get my bearings, I want to explore every alley.

switzerland-travel/112.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/112.text: How do I get a ticket for the Glacier Express?

switzerland-travel/112.speaker: Friend
switzerland-travel/112.text: First class or second? Get a ticket with a seat reservation.

switzerland-travel/112.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/112.text: Wait — do we get on at platform 7 or 8?

switzerland-travel/112.speaker: Friend
switzerland-travel/112.text: We get off at Filisur — don't miss the stop.

switzerland-travel/112.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/112.text: I nearly forgot to get off — the view hypnotized me.

switzerland-travel/113.speaker: Friend
switzerland-travel/113.text: From here you'll get a view of the whole Bernese Alps.

switzerland-travel/113.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/113.text: I think I'm getting altitude sickness — head is spinning.

switzerland-travel/113.speaker: Friend
switzerland-travel/113.text: Sit still. Altitude sickness passes if you rest.

switzerland-travel/113.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/113.text: Can I get change for this twenty-franc note?

switzerland-travel/113.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/113.text: Worth it — I got a view of mountains I'll never forget.

switzerland-travel/114.speaker: Hotel host
switzerland-travel/114.text: You might get snowed in tonight — roads are closing.

switzerland-travel/114.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/114.text: We got held up by the avalanche warning.

switzerland-travel/114.speaker: Friend
switzerland-travel/114.text: We can get by with phrasebook German and gestures.

switzerland-travel/114.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/114.text: English gets you by here — everyone is kind.

switzerland-travel/114.speaker: Friend
switzerland-travel/114.text: Sometimes getting held up is how you meet the best stories.

switzerland-travel/114.speaker: Hook
switzerland-travel/114.text: Next: Lost on the Alpine Trail

switzerland-travel/115.speaker: Friend
switzerland-travel/115.text: Stay close — it's easy to get lost up here.

switzerland-travel/115.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/115.text: I think we're lost — which way back to Zermatt?

switzerland-travel/115.speaker: Friend
switzerland-travel/115.text: Listen — we got swept up in a local festival by accident.

switzerland-travel/115.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/115.text: Best wrong turn ever — I got swept up in the music.

switzerland-travel/115.speaker: Local
switzerland-travel/115.text: I can get you a ride back — jump in the back.

switzerland-travel/115.speaker: Nam
switzerland-travel/115.text: Switzerland taught me how to get around — even when lost.

english-everyday-get/116.speaker: Nam
english-everyday-get/116.text: I need to get ready — deep breath.

english-everyday-get/116.speaker: Facilitator
english-everyday-get/116.text: It takes time to get used to speaking English out loud.

english-everyday-get/116.speaker: Nam
english-everyday-get/116.text: Sorry — I'm not used to talking this long in English.

english-everyday-get/116.speaker: Partner
english-everyday-get/116.text: You got through the hardest part — the first five minutes.

english-everyday-get/116.speaker: Nam
english-everyday-get/116.text: I got through my first meetup without switching to Vietnamese.

english-everyday-get/116.speaker: Hook
english-everyday-get/116.text: Next: When You Finally Get It

english-everyday-get/117.speaker: Tutor
english-everyday-get/117.text: Don't memorize lists — use them until you get it.

english-everyday-get/117.speaker: Nam
english-everyday-get/117.text: Oh — I get it now. Get blocked means dependency stopped me.

english-everyday-get/117.speaker: Nam
english-everyday-get/117.text: Let me get back to you after this lesson — I'm studying.

english-everyday-get/117.speaker: Barista
english-everyday-get/117.text: Your English is good — you get by fine here.

english-everyday-get/117.speaker: Nam
english-everyday-get/117.text: I used to get by with one-word answers. Not anymore.

english-everyday-get/118.speaker: Nam
english-everyday-get/118.text: I'll get you onboarded — same as my SF rotation.

english-everyday-get/118.speaker: HR
english-everyday-get/118.text: We need your sign-off as his onboarding buddy.

english-everyday-get/118.speaker: Nam
english-everyday-get/118.text: Get looped in, get unblocked, get shipped — you'll hear these daily.

english-everyday-get/118.speaker: Riku
english-everyday-get/118.text: Can I get a ride to the station with you?

english-everyday-get/118.speaker: Nam
english-everyday-get/118.text: I got onboarded once too. Now I help others get it.

english-everyday-get/118.speaker: Nam
english-everyday-get/118.text: Everyday English isn't perfect — but you get by, get better, and get heard.
